title: Builders Essentials
body:
The **Builder's Essentials** modpack includes all the most important mods for builders working in **creative mode**! Many mods have been pre-configured for the best experience!
## SHOWCASE
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/G4bX5xk-XYA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## INSTALLATION 
**1.** Download a launcher (I recommend [**Prism Launcher**](https://prismlauncher.org/download/windows/))

**2. Prism Launcher** [**(Tutorial)**](https://youtu.be/rVynxFjbHW4?si=kAOub7U4-NXANCKs)
- Click "**Add Instance**", select "**Modrinth**" on the left of the window, search "**Builders Essentials**" select and install!

**3. (Optional)** 
- I recommend allocating additional RAM for better performance. Go with **6-8GB** of ram. (Don't allocate over half the ram you have available.)

- You are able to add any additional mods you want yourself! If you have suggestions for additional mods, or need support, join the [**Discord Server!**](https://discord.gg/SP3PQsynTW)

## NOTABLE MODS
- [Axiom](https://modrinth.com/mod/N6n5dqoA)
- [WorldEdit](https://modrinth.com/mod/1u6JkXh5)
- Performance mods to maximize FPS ([Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/AANobbMI) and others)
- [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/YL57xq9U) (Shaders) ([Complementary Reimagined]([https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)) included)
- [e4mc](https://modrinth.com/mod/qANg5Jrr) (Multiplayer on your Singleplayer worlds)
- [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/w7ThoJFB) (Zoom) (C)
- [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/NcUtCpym) (Navigation) (M)
- [Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/M08ruV16) (Higher render distance)
- [Coordinate Manager](https://modrinth.com/mod/Oxn8vgIu) (Navigation) (F9) (F10)
- [Pack/Rule Menus](https://modrinth.com/mod/TR0G6vEd) (Manage Rules/Datapacks on pause menu)
- [CommandKeys](https://modrinth.com/mod/65UyswbY) (Macros) (K)
- [Freecam](https://modrinth.com/mod/XeEZ3fK2) (Optional) (F4)
- [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/uCdwusMi) (Higher render distance) (Removed for now)
- [Voxy](https://modrinth.com/mod/fxxUqruK) (Higher render distance)
- [Flashback](https://modrinth.com/mod/4das1Fjq) (Cinematics)
- [Gamma Utils](https://modrinth.com/mod/wdLuzzEP) (Fullbright) (G)
- And more!
